figures.caption: FIG. 1. Schematic representation of the Transformer architecture. (a) Transformer layers are depicted as discrete evolution steps along the vertical axis (red), representing ordered layer depth. (b) Detailed view of an individual l-th layer: the Self-attention block introduces non-local, off-diagonal coupling across the lattice sites, while the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) acts as a local, on-site operator. The forward pass through the network corresponds to the successive application of these operators, analogous to an evolution process.
